# Fulcrum

> Leverage for Discovery

Fulcrum connects exceptional technical talent with world-leading researchers to accelerate scientific breakthroughs. We bridge the gap between AI capability and scientific impact.

## What We Do

We recruit talented engineers and AI researchers to work alongside scientists, translating cutting-edge AI capabilities into meaningful research progress.

## Focus Areas

- Materials Science
- Drug Discovery
- Climate Modeling
- Genomics & Biology
- Energy Systems
- Public Health
- Agricultural Science
- Neuroscience

## Resources

- Fulcrum Hub: https://hub.fulcrum.science/ - Educational materials on AI for science

## Contact

- Email: hello@fulcrum.science
- Website: https://fulcrum.science/

## Leadership

- Alex Morcos, Co-Founder - Previously co-founded Hudson River Trading and Chaincode Labs
- Adam Jonas, Co-Founder - CEO at Chaincode Labs

## For Technologists

If you're an engineer or researcher who wants to apply AI to problems that matter, we want to hear from you.

## For Researchers

If you're a scientist who sees the potential for AI to transform your field, we want to partner with you.
